detaileddescription.para: Number of elements in a statically-allocated array.

briefdescription.para: C99 bool fallback for pre-C99 compilers.
Return status used by all SyntropicOS functions.
Logical state of a GPIO pin.

detaileddescription.para: The meaning of this value is platform-specific. It may encode a port+pin pair, a flat pin number, or any scheme the port layer defines.

briefdescription.para: Common type definitions and status codes for SyntropicOS.

detaileddescription.para: This header is included by virtually every other SyntropicOS file. It provides the fundamental types, enumerations, and constants used throughout the library.
